# Guardino Technologies

> Enterprise-grade DNS security and cognitive protection. Three forces, one defense — securing the digital fabric for organizations that take privacy and uptime seriously.

Guardino Technologies builds DNS-layer security and AI-assisted cognitive protection for enterprises. The platform is privacy-first, deploys in minutes, and combines real-time threat detection, DNS firewalling (RPZ), and DoH/DoT with cognitive analysis of query patterns.

## Core

- [Home](https://guardinotechnologies.com/): Securing the Digital Fabric — product overview and three-force defense model
- [About](https://guardinotechnologies.com/about): Company, mission, team behind Guardino
- [Products](https://guardinotechnologies.com/products): DNS security suite, cognitive protection, deployment options
- [Solutions](https://guardinotechnologies.com/solutions): Industry-specific use cases and enterprise scenarios
- [Contact](https://guardinotechnologies.com/contact): Request demo, sales contact, support

## Localized

- [Türkçe](https://guardinotechnologies.com/tr): Turkish version

## Optional

- [Sitemap](https://guardinotechnologies.com/sitemap-index.xml): Full URL index for crawlers
- [robots.txt](https://guardinotechnologies.com/robots.txt): Crawler rules with Cloudflare Content Signals (search=yes, ai-input=yes, ai-train=no)
